<table>
  <thead>
    <tr><th>Item</th><th>Qty</th><th>Remark</th></tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr><th>Widget A</th><td>10</td><td>Normal</td></tr>
    <tr><th>Widget B</th><td>20</td><td>Priority</td></tr>
    <tr><th>Total Exposure</th><td>30</td><td>Real business label, not a legend</td></tr>
  </tbody>
  <tfoot>
    <tr><td colspan="3">Footnote: Quantities include carry-over from prior week.</td></tr>
    <tr><td colspan="3">Legend: Qty is net of cancellations.</td></tr>
  </tfoot>
</table>
